items.title: Alta raises $25M Series A to rebuild the GTM stack with AI agents
items.note: Tel Aviv startup already powers Snowflake, Deel and Atlassian, on track for 800% revenue growth this year

items.title: Lyzr closes $100M Series B after letting its own AI agent run the raise
items.note: SivaClaw fielded 130+ investor Q&As and tracked slide engagement, round doubles valuation to $500M

items.title: Prime Intellect raises $130M so enterprises can train their own AI agents
items.note: Radical Ventures-led round hits $1B valuation, Ramp and Zapier already paying customers

items.title: xAI's Grok 4.5 launches at half the price of Claude and GPT rivals
items.note: $2/$6 per million tokens undercuts Opus 4.8 by 60%+, first product since the Anysphere/Cursor acquisition

items.title: Existing-home sales fall 2.4% in June as rates hold near 6.5%
items.note: NAR report shows sales still up 2.8% year-over-year despite the monthly pullback

items.title: Serial founder Eyal Azoulay raises $20M seed for AI financial-crime investigator Tangos
items.note: Third exit for Azoulay, team includes ex-OFAC and Israeli intel veterans, led by Red Dot Capital
